texto: Since the day I was born, wrestling has sustained me and my family. It's the way my father fed me; it's the way I feed my kids. More importantly, wrestling is my greatest release. It's been such a blessing for me. I can step into the ring and let it all go - all my anger, all my frustration, all my pain.
explicacao: Citação de Eddie Guerrero sobre temas ligados a familia. “Since the day I was born, wrestling has sustained me and my family. It's the way my father fed me…” articula familia, family, father em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como father e pain.
